data.title: Director of Project Execution
data.jd_text:
Together we make the difference

We are a leading provider of innovative and high-performance solutions for airport logistics. Our portfolio includes products and solutions for baggage and cargo handling, high-end software for the digitalization of logistics processes as well as an extensive range of maintenance and services. Major customers include renowned airports and airlines around the globe.

We are looking for an experienced Director of Project Execution who will report directly to the Executive Management and oversee multiple airport BHS and MHS projects. You will provide guidance and leadership to the Project Execution and Site Management teams, foster collaboration across internal functions and external stakeholders, and ensure projects are delivered safely, on-time, on-budget, contract compliant, and to the required quality through to handover.

What are my responsibilities?

Lead end-to-end delivery of airport BHS/MHS programs, ensuring safe, on-budget, contract-compliant execution.Serve as senior client and stakeholder lead, aligning airport authorities/operators, consultants/PMCs, contractors, and internal teams.Own the full lifecycle from engineering coordination through installation, integration, testing, commissioning, ORAT, and handover to Service.Drive strong project governance (steerco, reviews, workshops), ensuring clear decisions, actions, and follow-up.Manage portfolio performance across multi-site/multi-country matrix teams; control KPIs, risk, change, and escalations, including recovery/turnaround.Ensure effective site execution in live airport environments, including M&E installation, upgrades, brownfield works, and system interface management.Ensure completeness and quality of technical/contract documentation and reporting across the project lifecycle.Lead successful handovers to Life-Cycle Services, ensuring continuity, training, spares, warranty transition, and sign-off.Support Sales & Bid activities to develop opportunities and ensure executable delivery strategies and resourcing inputs.Build and lead high-performing teams through coaching, accountability, and continuous improvement.

What do I need to qualify for the role?

10+ years delivering complex engineering/automation/site projects; strong ownership of cost, schedule, quality, and safety.Proven leadership in multi-stakeholder environments with strong client-facing and executive communication capability.Strong experience in airport BHS or MHS systems including site execution and commissioning; ORAT exposure is a plus.Solid understanding of automation integration environments (mechanical/electrical, PLC/SCADA/controls, interfaces).Strong commercial and contractual discipline: change control, risk/opportunity management, claims awareness.Proficient in project tools (e.g., MS Project/Primavera, MS Office; Jira/Confluence is a plus).Willingness to travel and operate in dynamic airport environments.Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus.

data.title: Head of Transformation and Strategy
data.jd_text:
We have partnered with a large, diversified UAE-based conglomerate to appoint a Head of Transformation. This is a Group-level leadership role responsible for designing and driving a coordinated business transformation agenda across a complex, multi-sector organisation. Reporting directly to the Group CEO, this is a rare opportunity to shape how a major conglomerate evolves its operating model, organisational structure and commercial performance at scale.
This role is for someone who has led large, complex business transformation programmes from strategy through to execution, not IT or digital change, but genuine enterprise-wide transformation spanning people, process, structure and culture. You will be a credible, senior voice in the room, capable of influencing at the highest levels while maintaining hands-on accountability for delivery.
About the role:Define and lead the Group's business transformation strategy, ensuring alignment with the overall vision and priorities of Group leadershipIdentify and drive transformation opportunities across business units, including operating model redesign, organisational effectiveness, process improvement and commercial performanceBuild and lead a high-performing transformation function, embedding structured programme delivery and change management disciplines across the GroupOwn the transformation portfolio from business case through to benefits realisation, maintaining clear accountability and pace throughoutAct as a trusted advisor to the Group CEO, COO and Board, providing transparent visibility on progress, risks and outcomesPartner with business unit CEOs and functional leaders to build transformation capability and drive sustained adoption of changeEstablish governance frameworks and reporting mechanisms that give leadership confidence in the execution of the transformation agendaDrive a performance culture within the transformation function, setting high standards for rigour, commercial thinking and delivery quality
 About you:15+ years of progressive experience leading business transformation within large, complex, multi-business-unit organisations or a minimum of 3 years as a Principal or Senior Engagement Manager at a Tier 1 management consultancy with direct accountability on large-scale business transformation mandatesProven track record of delivering enterprise-wide transformation programmes spanning operating model change, organisational redesign and performance improvementDeep understanding of the structural and operational dynamics of diversified conglomerates, including navigating matrix environments, multiple P&Ls and competing stakeholder agendasStrong commercial acumen with the ability to connect transformation activity to tangible business outcomes and financial value

data.title: Head of Business and Economics
data.jd_text: Job Description GEMS Wellington Academy – Al Khail is seeking to appoint an outstanding Head of Business and Economics from August 2026. The successful candidate will lead a high-performing department, ensuring excellent teaching, strong academic outcomes and a curriculum that prepares students for future pathways. Job Purpose: The Head of Business and Economics provides strategic and operational leadership of the department across Key Stages 4 and 5. The role focuses on delivering a high-quality curriculum, supporting staff development and ensuring all students achieve their full potential. Key Responsibilities: Lead curriculum planning, delivery and review across Business, Economics and vocational courses. Ensure high-quality teaching and consistent standards across the department. Monitor and analyse student progress, implementing targeted interventions where needed. Oversee assessment processes, including BTEC verification and exam preparation. Lead, support and develop teaching staff, including coaching and performance management. Promote a collaborative team culture with high expectations for staff and students. Engage with parents through reporting and school events. Develop links with universities, industry and external partners. Contribute to school self-evaluation, inspection readiness and improvement planning. Support whole-school priorities including literacy, inclusion and digital learning. Promote enrichment opportunities and support student career pathways. Skills Proven leadership experience within a secondary school setting. Strong subject knowledge in Business and/or Economics. Excellent understanding of the British curriculum and assessment frameworks. Strong communication, organisational and leadership skills. Ability to inspire and develop both students and staff. Recognised teaching qualification (PGCE or equivalent). Bachelor’s degree in a relevant subject; further qualifications desirable. GEMS Education is committed to safeguarding and promoting the welfare of all of its students and staff. A UK-enhanced DBS or equivalent police check is a pre-requisite for all appointments.

data.title: Global Commercial Excellence Director
data.location: Global Village, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: When you can’t breathe, nothing else matters. That’s why a career at Breas Medical matters. Our mission is to improve the quality of life and care of respiratory patients around the world, and right now, Breas is on an exciting transformation journey. We are growing globally, strengthening our commercial capabilities, and embracing new ways of working that support innovation, scalability, and long‑term success. As we evolve, we are investing in smarter processes, modern technology, and a more connected commercial organization - creating real opportunities to shape the future of how we serve our customers and partners worldwide. Are you our next Global Commercial Excellence Director – a new role driving global commercial transformation? We are looking for a strategic, collaborative, change-oriented leader to build and drive a global Commercial Excellence function that becomes a catalyst for Breas’ commercial growth. In this role you will set the direction for how Breas sell and serves customers globally, strengthen sales effectiveness, harmonize commercial ways of working across regions, and elevate the customer experience through data driven decision making, a CRM ecosystem, and high quality commercial processes. In addition, you will be responsible for advancing sales force enablement, embedding Commercial Excellence disciplines, driving data driven business planning and performance governance, accelerating new customer acquisition, and enabling solution selling capabilities and tools across the organization. A key priority will be the global rollout, adoption and value realization of our CRM platform to ensure consistent execution, visibility, and performance management. While our head office is located in Mölnlycke, Sweden, the location for this role is flexible, and the position offers a hybrid working model. In this role, you will report directly to the Chief Commercial Officer and serve as a critical member of the Commercial Leadership Team. You will work closely with a focused group of regional and global stakeholders, including Commercial Leadership, Marketing, Finance, HR, Operations, Technical Service, Customer Experience and IT & Digital, to ensure alignment, build enterprise-level capabilities, and drive high quality execution across all markets. Main Responsibilities Global Sales Processes & Governance You will design and maintain clear global sales processes and stage definitions, ensuring consistency across all markets. Together with regional leaders, you establish governance that supports aligned ways of working and a strong commercial performance rhythm. Sales Enablement & Capability Building You develop structured onboarding, sales playbooks and tools that support every step of the customer journey. By collaborating with HR and learning teams, you help secure the right capabilities across the organisation. Data, CRM & Commercial Technology You own the direction, roadmap and standards for our global CRM and commercial data standards, ensuring quality, adoption and usability across regions. Through relevant insights and practical tools, you enable better decision making and a more modern, scalable commercial setup. Sales Performance, Analytics & Forecasting You provide clear dashboards and analytic insights that strengthen forecast accuracy and pipeline discipline. Your work supports leaders and teams in making factbased decisions and driving stronger commercial outcomes. Sales Incentives & Performance Governance You lead the global incentive design cycle, ensuring plans are simple, aligned and effective. Through transparent governance, you help maintain fairness, motivation and strong performance across commercial teams. Customer Experience (CX) You hold global process owner responsibility for Customer Experience, defining clear principles, structures and expected outcomes. By coordinating approaches across customer facing functions, you help secure a consistent and value‑creating customer experience worldwide. To be successful in this job.. We believe you are a collaborative, influence-driven leader with strong analytical ability and a global mindset. You navigate complex, matrixed environments with ease, combining strategic thinking with hands-on execution and are comfortable leading through influence while setting clear direction. You also bring: University degree in Business, Marketing, Engineering, or equivalent Extensive experience in commercial excellence, sales operations or sales leadership in an international setting. Strong CRM and data capabilities; experience leading CRM programs. Advanced analytical skills and ability to convert insights into actionable recommendations. Skilled at leading through influence in a matrix organization and collaborating across global teams. Experience in capability building, sales enablement, or training design Experience with sales incentive design is an advantage. Curiosity and high learning agility, with interest in AI‑enabled and digital commer

data.title: VP - Digital Trade Solutions
data.jd_text: Job Summary : The role is a senior leadership role that focuses on driving digital transformation, developing technology-driven products, and enhance commercial value through digital channels. The role will spearhead the digital transformation of products, driving adoption of digital platforms, automating processes, and enhancing customer experience (user journey) to increase revenue and operational efficiency. Key Responsibilities Strategic Leadership: Develop and implement a digital strategy for trade solutions that aligns with organizational goals and market trends. Product Management & Commercialization: Lead the development, launch, and enhancement of digital trade channels, such as Port Community Systems (PCS), Supply Chain Finance platforms, and digital customs systems. Onboarding & Client Services: Manage the onboarding of clients and counterparties to digital platforms, driving adoption rates and ensuring a seamless user experience. Digital Transformation: Lead cross-functional initiatives to move from manual/paper-based trade processes to digital solutions (e.g., e-bills of lading). Operational Risk & Governance: Ensure all digital solutions are compliant with regulatory standards and internal risk frameworks, including KYC/AML in digital onboarding. Vendor & Stakeholder Management: Coordinate with external technology partners, consultants, and internal departments (IT, Sales, Legal, Operations) to implement solutions. Data Analysis & Performance Monitoring: Utilize dashboards and data insights to track transaction volumes, system performance, and ROI of digital platforms. Required Experience & Qualifications Education: A Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Business, Finance, Information Technology, or a related field. Experience: 7+ years of experience in trade finance, banking, or logistics technology, with proven success in leading digital product launches. Digital Literacy: Deep understanding of trade finance technologies (e.g., SWIFT, blockchain), FinTech solutions, and digital banking platforms. Leadership Skills: Proven ability to manage teams, influence stakeholders, and drive projects in a fast-paced environment.

data.title: Founding Head of the Investor Club
data.jd_text:
About Us

The DM Capital Council is a new, private, members-only club for sophisticated investors, entrepreneurs, and builders looking to access and invest in the next generation of category-defining companies. We are not a typical angel group. We are a community-first organization built on the principles of deep diligence, collaborative learning, and exclusive access.

Our unfair advantage is our origin. We are launching from within the Decentralized Masters ecosystem, giving us a built-in, high-trust audience of 4500 of the smartest minds in the space. Our mission is to build the most engaged and, respected and high-performing private investor community in our niche, and we are looking for a world-class leader to build it with us.

The Role: Founding Head of the Club

This is a CEO-level role for a new venture. You are not joining a team; you are building one. You will be the public face, the chief architect, and the operational engine of the entire club. Your mission: transform this concept into a vibrant, profitable, and self-sustaining business in 90 days.

What You Will Do:

Be the Face of the Brand:

Host all events, lead member communications, and represent the club publicly with charisma and authorityServe as the primary spokesperson, shaping the club's voice and narrative across media, online, and live events

Architect the Community:

Design and execute the entire member journey, from onboarding to daily engagement, with a goal of achieving +70 NPSImplement frameworks that foster meaningful interaction, retention, and community-driven growth

Drive Growth:

Leverage the Decentralized Masters ecosystem to acquire the first 50 members in 90 days and design a scalable growth engine for the futureEstablish clear metrics and systems to monitor engagement, conversion, and retention

Run the Investment Engine:

Build and manage a high-quality deal flow pipeline, including sourcing, screening, due diligence, and presenting opportunities to membersPartner with founders and co-investors to secure exclusive investment opportunities

Own the Business:

Manage the P&L, oversee tech stack selection and implementation, and run day-to-day operations with extreme ownership and operational disciplineDevelop processes, reporting, and dashboards to ensure accountability and measurable outcomes

Requirements

Who You Are:

A Proven Builder: You have 5-7+ years of experience and a track record of building something exceptional from scratch - a company, a community, a major productA Community Native: You have direct experience building and scaling a paid community. You understand the art and science of belongingA Public Presence: You are a compelling communicator who is comfortable on stage, on camera, and in the spotlightOperationally Excellent: You turn chaos into systems. You are a master of process, prioritization, automation, and getting things doneDI (Dominance-Influence) Personality: You are a natural leader who can command a room (Influence) and has the relentless drive to execute and achieve results (Dominance)

Benefits

Why This Role is a Unique Opportunity:

Build Your Legacy: This is a chance to build a category-defining company from the ground up, with your vision at the centerUnfair Advantage: You are not starting from zero. You have a built-in distribution channel of thousands of engaged, high-trust members from Day 1Significant Upside: You will receive a competitive base salary, a performance bonus tied to growth, and an equity/carry package that gives you a direct stake in the club's success

If you are a builder who is ready to step up and lead, we want to hear from you.

data.title: Head of Subscription | Hertz | Financial Services Transformation & Development

Structured into five operating divisions; automotive, financial services, real estate, retail and healthcare; employing more than 35,000 employees across more than 20 countries in the Middle East, Asia and Africa, Al-Futtaim Group partners with over 200 of the world's most admired and innovative brands. Al-Futtaim Group’s entrepreneurship and relentless customer focus enables the organisation to continue to grow and expand; responding to the changing needs of our customers within the societies in which we operate. By upholding our values of respect, excellence, collaboration and integrity; Al-Futtaim Group continues to enrich the lives and aspirations of our customers each and every day. Develop staff schedules and ensure adequate coverage during peak times. Foster a positive work environment and promote teamwork. Employee Productivity: Measured by subscriptions processed per employee. Effective in setting priorities and scheduling activities. Identify new business opportunities and contribute to growth strategies. Ensure sales targets and customer acquisition goals are met. Booking Conversion Rate: Percentage of inquiries converted into rentals. Upselling & Cross-selling Revenue: Additional revenue from upgrades, insurance, etc. Compliance & Risk Management Ensure that all rental agreements comply with company policies and legal regulations. Oversee adherence to vehicle maintenance schedules and safety inspections. Implement policies to minimize risks, including fraud prevention and damage control. Compliance & Audit Score: Ensuring adherence to safety and legal regulations. Smooth functioning of the department delivering desired service and quality levels. Required Skills To Be Successful: Strong customer relations and team building skills. Strong commercial acumen. Ability to maintain a good tracking system on applications for better management of business. Excellent communication, problem solving, and analytical skills. What Qualifies You For The Role: University graduate. At least 5 years of experience in the customer service industry. General understanding of the car rental industry. Fluent in English and Arabic. We’re here to provide excellent service but a little help from you can ensure a five-star candidate experience from start to finish. data.title: Director of Learning, 2 Hour Learning (Remote) - $200,000/year USD
data.jd_text: Are you prepared to harness AI's power to transform student outcomes? 2 Hour Learning has woven AI into the fabric of our organization—it's not an add-on, but our foundation. We have rebuilt the educational experience from scratch, combining AI with advances in learning science to break free from traditional schooling constraints. The outcome? Students who consistently exceed expectations. Our results speak for themselves: learners on our platform routinely score 4s and 5s on five or more AP exams, show more than two years of progress on annual MAP assessments, and surpass their own assumptions about what they can accomplish. If you are driven by the prospect of delivering transformational impact at scale, 2 Hour Learning is your destination. As the lead architect of our groundbreaking learning ecosystem for your assigned school model—spanning multiple campuses—you will channel an absolute dedication to student success. You'll leverage AI's limitless capacity to design hyper-personalized learning pathways that respond to each student's distinct needs, interests, and goals. Your position combines data-informed strategy with direct involvement. You'll immerse yourself in learning analytics, extracting critical insights to accelerate exponential progress. Yet you won't remain behind the scenes analyzing metrics—you'll engage on the ground with students to grasp their experiences, obstacles, and victories. This direct insight will prove essential as you identify the precise motivational drivers and teaching methods needed to break through achievement barriers across every campus. You will lead a talented team of learning engineers, data scientists, and instructional pioneers to execute your strategic vision. More crucially, you'll advocate relentlessly for our students, guaranteeing that every choice, innovation, and approach centers on elevating their learning results. This represents a rare opportunity to deploy AI in education and completely reimagine the possible. Equipped with advanced learning analytics' predictive capabilities, the capacity to run pedagogical A/B tests at scale, and organizational support to challenge conventions, you'll pioneer new approaches daily. Your scope is expansive, your resources exceptional, and your mandate essential. At 2 Hour Learning, we're not simply using AI to improve test scores—we're releasing the complete potential of human capability, entirely without traditional classroom instructors. If you are ready to apply the most transformative technology of our era to reshape society's most fundamental institution, your time is now. Bold vision, disciplined implementation, and unwavering dedication to student achievement are essential. Those comfortable with conventional approaches should look elsewhere. Join us at the forefront of education's AI transformation. Together, we won't merely anticipate the future of learning—we'll build it. Learn more about 2 Hour Learning at our website [https://2hourlearning.com/] and visit the Future of Education Instagram page [https://www.instagram.com/futureof_education/]. To explore a school designed around 2 Hour Learning, see Alpha [https://alpha.school/]. What You Will Be Doing Designing and continuously refining an AI-powered learning ecosystem that demonstrably surpasses conventional education, validated by concrete improvements in student performance metrics Interacting directly with students via virtual channels to comprehend their learning journeys, obstacles, and achievements, applying these insights to drive ongoing refinement of the learning ecosystem Analyzing learning platform data to identify actionable insights and create high-impact academic interventions using AI/ML, learning science, and motivational strategies Fostering a culture of ambitious experimentation and evidence-driven decision-making, utilizing data to achieve breakthrough improvements in student growth patterns Collaborating with platform engineering, data science, and design teams to convert academic insights and student input into fluid product improvements What You Won’t Be Doing Wrapping traditional instruction in AI packaging. This isn't about delivering classroom teaching through digital screens – we're rebuilding learning from its foundation. Working with data in a vacuum. You'll regularly interact with K-12 students, treating their feedback as critical input from our customers. Waiting for unanimous approval before innovating. You'll advance a bold vision and mobilize others around measurable outcomes. Adhering to established methods. You'll have the freedom to test novel approaches to motivation, assessment, and teaching. Viewing AI as a threat to education. In this role, you'll embrace AI as a powerful tool to transform learning, not a risk to manage. Director Of Learning Key Responsibilities Lead innovation in AI-driven, teacher-less education to produce outstanding student results across multiple campuses. Combine data analysis with consistent stu

data.title: Head of Streamer Relations (Asia)
data.jd_text: About us: ARRISE sets the benchmark for service delivery and excellence in the iGaming industry. Playing a key role in the success of its clients, which include Pragmatic Play, a brand relied upon by the world’s biggest online casinos for its cutting-edge products, ARRISE helps to deliver exceptional gaming experiences to millions of players worldwide. Our global team of over 10,000 talented and driven professionals are shaping the future of iGaming. Headquartered in Gibraltar, we have offices spanning Canada, India, the Isle of Man, Latvia, Malta, Romania, Serbia, Bulgaria, and the UAE, and more exciting destinations on the horizon. At ARRISE, we take pride in creating growth opportunities at all levels, constantly investing in our people while welcoming new colleagues and forging strategic partnerships that open new opportunities for success. To achieve this, we bet on ourselves. We know that success is a collective effort, and our team is driven by ambition, collaboration, and a shared commitment to grow and succeed—while embracing every step of the journey. Be part of the future of iGaming with 10,000 ARRISERS! See a job that excites you? Apply now, and our friendly recruitment team will connect with you soon. Your journey starts here! About the role: This senior leadership role will oversee the regional Streamer Relationship team— comprising of Team Leaders and Streamer Relations Managers — while also personally managing relationships with a portfolio of our most valuable, high-impact streamers. You will help define and then execute the regional streamer strategy and supporting incentivization plan, ensuring our slot games achieve exceptional visibility, engagement, and advocacy across major streaming platforms. What you'll be doing: With the help of senior management, define and lead the regional streamer strategy, aligning with commercial marketing goals to maximise exposure and engagement across key markets. Develop and implement scalable streamer incentivization programes, campaign frameworks, and retention strategies. Directly manage relationships with a portfolio of the company's highest-value streamers, offering bespoke support and strategic alignment. Lead and support Streamer Relations Manager Team Leaders, and Streamer Relations Managers ensuring they are high-performing, motivated, and aligned with global objectives. Oversee KPIs for streamer activity, ensuring accountability and performance tracking across all teams. Collaborate cross-functionally with Product, Marketing and Compliance to ensure seamless integration of streamer activity with broader initiatives. Collaborate with the Commercial Marketing Director on managing the global streamer strategy budget, ensuring effective allocation of resources to maximise return on investment. Monitor industry trends, platform developments, and competitor strategies to maintain thought leadership and innovation within the team. Provide regular reporting and insights to the Commercial Marketing Director, including performance analysis, strategic proposals, and risk/opportunity assessments. Champion a culture of excellence, collaboration, and creativity across the Streamer Relations function in the region. What we ask of you: Extensive experience in influencer/creator partnerships, streamer relations, or community management, ideally within iGaming, gaming, entertainment, or streaming industries. Strong understanding of streaming platforms such as Twitch, YouTube, and Kick, with deep knowledge of creator ecosystems and streaming trends. Fluency in English, knowledge of one additional Southeast or East Asian language such as Tagalog, Thai, Indonesian, Korean or Vietnamese is a plus. Proven experience managing high-value streamer or influencer partnerships and building long-term strategic relationships. Demonstrated leadership experience managing or mentoring partnership, influencer, or marketing teams. Strong organisational and strategic planning skills, with experience leading campaigns, incentive programs, and large-scale creator collaborations. Analytical and data-driven mindset, with experience tracking performance, engagement metrics, and ROI across influencer or streamer programs. Ability to collaborate cross-functionally with Marketing, Product, Commercial, and Compliance teams to drive aligned initiatives. Excellent stakeholder management, negotiation, and communication skills with senior internal and external partners. Passion for gaming, streaming, and digital communities, with awareness of industry trends and competitor activity. Flexibility to occasionally work outside regular hours to align with global streamer schedules and key events. Willingness to travel for industry events, conferences, and key creator activations. What we offer in return: A detailed company training on highest standards. A chance to work in friendly and supportive culture. Tremendous growth opportunities in a large fast moving international company. Grow with ARRISE

data.title: Director - Finance
data.jd_text: Date: Mar 3, 2026 Location: Dubai, AE Company: I STYLE COMPUTERS (L.L.C) Req ID: 2937 Branch: Job Title Director - Finance Job Scope The Director – Finance is responsible for overseeing the entire spectrum of finance and accounting including steering the financial direction of the business, strategic financial planning and management of financial resources. S/He supports the stakeholders by providing timely MIS reporting and developing budgets maintaining healthy working capital requirements to run the business efficiently Main Duties And Responsibilities Technical and Operations Secure the financial health and stability of the company; Oversee the overall accounting processes ensuring that proper books of accounts are maintained for effective financial control in accordance with corporate standards and local statutory requirements; Conceptualize a smooth and efficient recovery plan to ensure that all debts are collected in a timely manner and coordinate with the insurance company as well as the sales and legal departments of the company on credit actions; Develop financial business modules based on need using adequate tools to assess project costs, profits and risks; Manage the annual budget preparation and periodic forecasts and prepare periodic financial analysis of the company financial situation supporting management decision; Ensure compliance with local regulations, tax laws, transfer pricing and other applicable regulations; Identify opportunities for optimizing financial and accounting operations and systems, consolidate operating improvements and processes at departmental level and drive the transformation with the IT department; Ensure the timely preparation of monthly, quarterly and annual financial statements for the company and its related subsidiaries in compliance with IFRS and/or other guiding principles; Manage the consolidation of group IFRS reporting pack and liaise with auditors on the consolidation audits; Lead and participate as the key finance stakeholder in cross functional teams; Implement and drive the core financial processes and reporting activities including annual operating plans, long term plans and quarterly business reviews; Lead ad hoc financial analysis and root cause investigations; Monitor financial performance indicators, analyze trends and causes on unexpected variances; Oversee the company’s regulatory and reporting requirements and implement risk mitigation strategies; Manage the cash flow across the entities of the group; Liaise with the Legal Department and auditors to establish new entities and review all needed contracts; Provide financial and tax consultancy on new projects or models across countries; Develop internal control frameworks for operational processes and embed the automated controls in the system; Liaise with Internal and External Auditors on audit plans and closings; Liaise with External Tax Consultants on the deliverables needed to comply with transfer pricing and applicable laws; Lead the implementations of new tools related to Finance (i.e business intelligence, payroll etc) Talent Development Ensure that human capital and capabilities are aligned with the company HR strategy at a departmental level; Act as an agent of change and challenge departmental structures and processes to accompany change initiatives; Lead and coach the team cultivating empowerment and ownership; Develop capabilities and secure a solid succession plan. Position Requirements Education Bachelor’s degree in Finance or Accounting. Experience At least 12 years of relevant experience, including a minimum of 5 years in the UAE. CFA or CPA certification is preferred. A retail industry background is mandatory. Fluency in Arabic is mandatory. Only candidates who fully meet the above requirements will be considered.

data.title: Director – Media & Digital Performance
data.jd_text: Our client is a regional marketing and communications group supporting leading brands across the Middle East. The organisation is enhancing its digital and performance marketing capabilities. The Role The Director will lead media strategy, digital performance, and analytics across key client accounts. This role will oversee paid media, programmatic buying, and performance optimisation. A key focus will be delivering measurable ROI and data-driven insights. The Director will manage senior teams and agency partners. This role will also contribute to new business pitches and capability development. Leadership in a fast-paced client environment is essential. Candidate Profile The ideal candidate will have senior media or digital performance leadership experience within agencies or brand-side teams. Strong exposure to data analytics and performance optimisation is essential. Experience in the UAE or regional markets is highly preferred. The candidate must demonstrate commercial awareness, leadership capability, and client-facing credibility.

data.title: Director of Strategic Partnerships
data.jd_text: Director – Strategic Partnerships A senior leader is required to help shape and elevate a well-established academic brand on a global stage. This role will focus on building strong partnerships, driving reputation, and strengthening relationships with key stakeholders and international ranking bodies. You’ll ideally bring a solid background in corporate communications, partnerships, and brand strategy – experience within higher education or research environments is a big plus. Previous exposure to global rankings (QS, THE, etc.) would be highly valuable. Strong communication skills are key, along with a collaborative, forward-thinking mindset and the ability to thrive in a diverse, international environment. Open to candidates based outside the UAE (relocation/travel required), but excellent English is essential. This role will include significant travel. To apply for this role, please submit a copy of your CV.

data.title: Group Head of Performance & Rewards
data.jd_text: ROLE PURPOSE: The Group Head of Performance and Rewards is responsible for designing, implementing and continuously evolving Arada’s global performance and total rewards strategy. The role ensures that compensation, benefits, performance management, and recognition frameworks are aligned with the company’s business strategy and support the attraction, motivation, and retention of high-performing talent across all divisions. This position will establish a high-impact Centre of Excellence for Performance and Rewards, ensuring that all reward and performance frameworks drive business performance, reinforce the organization’s culture, and support Arada’s growth across its diversified portfolio of businesses including real estate development, hospitality, entertainment, industrial operations, fitness, wellness, and medical services. The role balances both intrinsic and extrinsic motivators to create a high-performance culture supported by fair, competitive, and transparent reward practices. The role will collaborate closely with PX Business Partners and Talent teams to ensure effective implementation across all business units. PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES: Global Total Rewards Strategy Develop and lead a global Total Rewards strategy aligned with Arada’s growth plans and workforce strategy. Responsibilities include: Designing a globally consistent but locally adaptable compensation framework Ensuring reward strategies support talent attraction, retention, and performance outcomes Aligning reward philosophy with Arada’s Employer Value Proposition (EVP) Creating reward frameworks appropriate for multiple business models including: -Real estate development -Hospitality and Entertainment -Industrial and Manufacturing Operations -Fitness and Wellness services -Medical and Longevity services Ensuring reward programs remain cost-effective, sustainable, and competitive Performance Management Strategy Develop and embed a modern performance management framework that supports a culture of accountability, feedback and high performance, linked to total rewards. Responsibilities include: Designing Arada’s global performance philosophy Implementing goal setting frameworks aligned to business strategy Driving clear objective alignment from leadership to frontline teams Designing annual performance cycles Embedding continuous feedback culture Developing frameworks for performance improvement planning Coaching leaders on effective performance conversations Integrating performance management with reward and career progression Employee Benefits Strategy Lead the design and management of Arada’s global employee benefits programs to ensure they support employee wellbeing and market competitiveness. Responsibilities include: Designing global benefits strategy aligned with our people’s needs Managing benefits across diverse sectors including operational and corporate roles Ensuring benefits reflect wellbeing, financial security, and lifestyle needs Vendor management for benefits providers Benefits optimization and cost analysis Development of benefits communication and marketing strategies Continuous evaluation of benefits effectiveness and personalization of benefits Programs include: Medical insurance Short and long term disability cover Life insurance Wellness and preventative health programs Retirement planning Lifestyle benefits Long-Term Incentive Plan (LTIP) Strategy and Design Lead the design and implementation of Long-Term Incentive Plans that align senior leadership and critical talent with the long-term value creation of the organization. Responsibilities include: Designing LTIP frameworks for senior executives and key leadership populations across Arada’s global businesses. Developing incentive structures that align leadership behavior with long-term strategic outcomes, profitability, and enterprise value creation. Creating tailored LTIP models for different business lines, including: -Real estate development -Hospitality and Entertainment -Industrial and Manufacturing Operations -Fitness and Wellness services -Medical and Longevity services Determining the most appropriate incentive instruments, which may include: -Cash-based long-term incentives -Phantom equity -Share appreciation rights -Equity participation programs (where appropriate) Establishing clear performance metrics linked to enterprise and business unit performance, such as: -EBITDA growth -Revenue growth -project profitability -return on invested capital -strategic milestone delivery Ensuring strong governance around LTIP eligibility, vesting schedules, performance conditions, and payout mechanisms. Partnering with Finance and executive leadership to ensure alignment with capital structure and long-term value creation objectives. Designing communication strategies so that LTIP programs are clearly understood and motivating for participants. IPO Readiness and Executive Reward Structuring Support the organization in building reward frameworks and performance governa

data.title: Director of Business Development
data.jd_text: The Business Development Director will play a critical role in shaping strategies and portfolio growth of the company by leading the analysis, feasibility and market analysis to drive informed, data-backed decision-making in line with shareholder expectations and corporate goals. The successful candidate will possess a robust background in real estate investment and sales, coupled with the ability to translate market insights into actionable strategies for built to sell business. Key Responsibilities: Built-to-Sell Strategy: Strategy Development: Develop and implement comprehensive real estate strategies for both new and existing built-to-sell projects, ensuring alignment with company goals and market opportunities. Market Insight: Identify emerging market trends, growth opportunities, and innovative strategies to enhance project viability and maximize shareholder returns. Data-Driven Recommendations: Provide actionable recommendations based on data-driven insights, ensuring projects meet both financial and operational benchmarks. Business Plans: Define, prepare, and oversee detailed business plans for real estate projects, including financial projections, funding strategies, timelines, and resource allocation. Portfolio & Value Creation: Lead discussions on portfolio performance, explore new opportunities, and recommend strategic shifts to drive value creation for the company. Cross-Functional Collaboration: Collaborate with Development, Sales, Finance, and Marketing teams to ensure that business plans are aligned with both internal and external stakeholder expectations. Pricing Strategy & Analysis: Pricing Strategy Development: Lead the development and implementation of pricing strategies that align with company objectives and market conditions. Market & Competitor Analysis: Continuously monitor and analyze competitors’ pricing and market dynamics, adjusting strategies accordingly to maintain competitiveness. Data Analytics: Utilize data analytics and market research to support pricing decisions and forecast future pricing trends. Cross-Department Collaboration: Work closely with Sales, Marketing, and Finance teams to establish effective pricing models that support product positioning and profitability. Feasibility Studies: Conduct detailed feasibility studies, including market research, financial modeling, and risk assessments, to evaluate new development opportunities. Partnership Development: Strategic Partnerships: Identify and establish strategic partnerships with landlords, co-investors, and other potential partners to maximize project returns. Negotiation & Integration: Lead negotiations and manage contract development, ensuring the successful integration of partnerships into the project framework. Concept Design Review: Design Alignment: Review initial concept designs to ensure that profitability metrics and KPIs are considered from the early stages of project development. Marketing & Branding Strategy: Go-to-Market Strategy: Collaborate with Marketing and Sales teams to define go-to-market strategies, including branding, positioning, pricing, and sales strategy, with a strong focus on market competition. Marketability & Innovation: Ensure the real estate portfolio’s marketability through innovative and tailored marketing approaches. Risk Management: Risk Identification: Proactively identify potential risks associated with project marketability and propose solutions to mitigate issues that could affect project success. Minimum Education, Qualifications & Experience: Education: Bachelor’s degree in Real Estate, Business, Finance, Urban Planning, or a related field. MBA or other advanced degrees are preferred. Professional Qualifications: Relevant certifications or accreditations in real estate, finance, or investment management are a plus. Competencies (Knowledge, Skills & Abilities): Analytical Skills: Strong analytical skills with the ability to evaluate market trends, financial data, and performance metrics to drive decision-making. Negotiation & Communication: Excellent negotiation, communication, and stakeholder management skills to effectively manage internal and external relationships. Leadership: Proven leadership capabilities, with experience in leading cross-functional teams and managing multiple projects simultaneously. Strategic Thinking: Strong strategic thinking and problem-solving abilities to navigate complex real estate projects and market dynamics. Project Management: Excellent project management skills, with a track record of delivering successful real estate projects on time and within budget. Experience: Minimum of 15 years of experience in real estate development, investment, or strategy roles, with demonstrated leadership experience. Proven success in driving data-driven decision-making in investment management, sales, and business planning in a real estate environment. Demonstrated experience in working with diverse, cross-functional teams to drive successful real estate out

data.title: Business Development Director
data.jd_text:
Thunes is scaling fast rapidly across the Middle East and we’re looking for elite hunters to open new markets and close transformational deals. If you love building, thrive on delivering big deals, and want to sell a product that actually moves money globally in real-time, this is your opportunity!

What You’ll Do

Own the end-to-end sales cycle - prospect, pitch, negotiate, close, and activateBuild and convert a high-quality pipeline of fintechs, banks, PSPs, and digital platformsOpen new markets, landing strategic logos and unlocking revenue fastDrive senior-level conversations with founders, C-suite, and product teamsCollaborate with internal teams to execute seamless go-lives and expand accounts


What You’ll Bring

8+ years in B2B payment sales, proven hunter DNAStrong network across PSPs, fintechs, banks, wallets, e-commerce playersTrack record of exceeding targets and closing complex commercial dealsExecution-first mindset - proactive, resilient, self-driven, hands-onFluent English; other regional languages welcome


Why join Thunes

Uncapped commission with real earning powerHigh-growth fintech backed by global investorsSell a mission-critical payments network used by world-class brands driving financial inclusionHuge white-space markets - build and own your territoryCulture of ownership, ambition, and entrepreneurial execution


About Thunes

Thunes is the Smart Superhighway to move money around the world. Thunes’ proprietary Direct Global Network allows Members to make payments in real-time in over 130 countries and more than 80 currencies.

Thunes’ network connects directly to over 7 billion mobile wallets and bank accounts worldwide, as well as 15 billion cards via more than 320 different payment methods, such as GCash, M-Pesa, Airtel, MTN, Orange, JazzCash, Easypaisa, AliPay, WeChat Pay and many more.

Thunes’ Direct Global Network differentiates itself through its worldwide reach, in-house SmartX Treasury System and Fortress Compliance Platform, ensuring Members of the network receive unrivaled speed, control, visibility, protection and cost efficiencies when making real-time payments, globally.

Members of Thunes’ Direct Global Network include gig economy giants like Uber and Deliveroo, super-apps like Grab and WeChat, MTOs, fintechs, PSPs and banks.

Headquartered in Singapore, Thunes has offices in 14 locations, including Abidjan, Barcelona, Beijing, Dubai, Hong Kong, Johannesburg, London, Manila, Nairobi, Paris, Riyadh, San Francisco and Shanghai.

For more information, visit: https://www.thunes.com/

data.title: Director of Influencer & Brand Partnerships
data.jd_text: The Director of Influencer & Brand Partnerships is responsible for leading the strategic vision, growth, and performance of Ego & East’s Talent Management division. This role oversees the management and development of a roster of talents, including high-profile and celebrity figures, while driving innovative brand partnerships that strengthen the agency’s market positioning and revenue growth. This position requires a forward-thinking leader who combines strategic planning with hands-on execution, ensuring that all talent and brand initiatives align with long-term business goals. The Director will manage a growing team, build and nurture key client relationships, and oversee negotiations and partnership activations across the MENA region and beyond. The ideal candidate will bring a deep understanding of influencer marketing, brand strategy, and the luxury and lifestyle landscape, with proven experience in driving large-scale partnerships and managing high-performing teams. JOB DUTIES & RESPONSIBILITIES Business Development & Growth Own and drive the commercial growth of the Talent & Partnerships division, with clear accountability for revenue targets and overall performance. Identify, develop, and secure high-value brand partnerships, collaborations, and new business opportunities across regional and international markets. Leverage an established network of brands, agencies, and decision-makers to generate leads and convert them into long-term partnerships. Lead the development of strategic proposals, RFP responses, and partnership frameworks, ensuring innovative and competitive positioning. Continuously identify new revenue streams, market opportunities, and expansion areas to scale the division sustainably. Influencer / Talent Strategy & Relationship Management Define and lead the long-term vision and positioning of the talent roster, ensuring alignment with market trends and business objectives. Oversee the management and development of high-profile and emerging talent, driving growth, visibility, and commercial success. Build and maintain strong, trusted relationships with talents, acting as a senior advisor on career strategy, partnerships, and brand positioning. Identify, attract, and sign top-tier and high-potential talent that strengthens the agency’s portfolio and competitive edge. Oversee and lead all negotiations for brand deals, ensuring optimal value, alignment, and long-term partnership opportunities. Brand Partnerships & Strategic Collaborations Build and nurture strong relationships with key brands, partners, and stakeholders across luxury, fashion, and lifestyle industries. Act as a senior point of contact for strategic partnerships, ensuring high-level client servicing and long-term collaboration success. Drive the ideation and execution of innovative campaigns and partnerships that elevate both talent and brand positioning. Collaborate cross-functionally with PR, marketing, events, and creative teams to deliver integrated and impactful campaigns. Team Leadership & Development Lead, structure, and scale a high-performing Talent & Partnerships team, ensuring clarity of roles, responsibilities, and performance expectations. Provide strong leadership, mentorship, and direction to senior and mid-level team members, fostering a high-performance culture. Establish processes, frameworks, and best practices to ensure operational excellence and scalability of the division. Oversee team performance, ensuring alignment with business goals, client expectations, and agency standards. KNOWLEDGE & EXPERIENCE 10–12+ years of experience in talent management, influencer marketing, brand partnerships, or related fields, with significant leadership exposure. Strong background in luxury, fashion, and lifestyle industries. Proven track record in business development, revenue generation, and securing high-value partnerships. Established network across brands, influencers, agencies, and key industry stakeholders. Experience managing and scaling teams and business units. Fluency in English (Arabic or French is a plus). SKILLS & ABILITIES Exceptional leadership and strategic planning abilities. Strong business acumen and client relationship management. Excellent negotiation, communication, and presentation skills. Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple complex projects simultaneously. Creative and analytical mindset with an eye for market opportunities. Confident, adaptable, and proactive in driving new initiatives and growth. If you’re interested, please share your resume at hr@maisonpyramide.com .

data.title: Director of Franchise Development
data.jd_text:
We are seeking Disruptive Entrepreneurs with Great Networking, Strategic, Execution & Business Advisory Skills and NOT Pure Job Seekers.
About the CompanyFranchiseBazar is expanding across the UAE and searching for passionate, high-caliber individuals ready to establish and scale their own franchise consultancy. Become the Co-founder /Co-Owner/CEO/MD of your business, backed by the global expertise of FranchiseBazar, and play a pivotal role in accelerating franchising and new business models in the UAE market.
About the RoleAs a Franchise Development Director reporting to the Principal Chief Executive Officer / Managing Partner, Co-Founder & Country Master Franchisee Owner, you’ll lead a dynamic business in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Al Ain, or Ajman, representing FranchiseBazar’s portfolio of 4000+ global and regional brands.
ResponsibilitiesConnect entrepreneurs, business buyers, investors, and SMEs with innovative franchise business opportunities every day.Advise SMEs, family offices, and local businesses to become franchise-ready and drive scalable growth.Enable UAE-based brands to expand across the Middle East, Indian Subcontinent, and beyond — while bringing international brands to the UAE.Offer A-Z franchise development solutions and be integral to the evolution of business models in one of the world’s hottest commercial hubs.
QualificationsSenior Investors / Management professionals (CXO, Director, Partner, VP, Head of Business, Consultants) looking for high-growth business and franchise opportunities.Minimum investment of 150,000 AED and a 300 sq ft dedicated office in Dubai (or similar commitment in other major UAE cities).If you are already operating a consultancy / advisory / brokerage business - franchise consultancy could be a natural diversification + addition and you could start getting great results and profitability, instantly.Option to start as a unit franchisee in major cities for 100,000 AED in Abu Dhabi, Sharjah, Al Ain, Ajman.
Required SkillsWell-networked individuals in UAE’s business, investment, real estate, government, and corporate sectors.English fluency is a must; knowledge of Arabic or other languages is a strong plus.Ability to recruit, manage, and inspire a branch network, as well as collaborate with other consultants, brokers, real estate professionals, and financial advisors.Proven business development skills and daily access to entrepreneurs, investors, and new clients from your existing network.
Preferred SkillsExperience in business advisory, consulting, investment deals, franchise or business brokerage, or management roles or real estate or franchise sales or franchise consulting.Strong track record in new business development, franchising, sales strategies, retail, construction, banking, financial advisory, or event management.Working successfully with entrepreneurs, start-ups, business buyers, and investors.Experience in corporate leadership, B2B consulting, strategy, or building high-level client relationships.
Pay range and compensation packageOperate as a business owner under an exclusive country license — not as an employee.Potential to earn a 70% share of revenues from your deals closed, with no upper limit.Pure performance-based remuneration: the more you scale your consulting and franchise sales business, the more you earn.Access to world-class training to become a certified franchise consultant in UAE.
Equal Opportunity StatementNo fixed monthly packages – this is an entrepreneurial, commission-only growth model built for leaders ready to make their mark in the booming franchise and consulting sector of the UAE.
Ready to Own Your Success? If you’re hungry to launch a franchise consulting business in Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah or any major UAE city, have the required investment, and possess a network you believe in, this is your platform!
We are also seeking Exclusive Master Franchise Partners for Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Bahrain, Kuwait, Egypt, Turkey & Jordan. Ask for a Detailed Presentation Should you be interested in any of the above country.
Email your CV with the subject “YES I Am Interested to Explore A Country Master Franchisee” to MENA@FranchiseBazar.com.
Let’s connect and write your next success story together!

data.title: Head Of Licensing And Regulatory Authorisations
data.jd_text: Job Description Join Tether and Shape the Future of Digital Finance At Tether, we’re not just building products, we’re pioneering a global financial revolution. Our cutting-edge solutions empower businesses—from exchanges and wallets to payment processors and ATMs—to seamlessly integrate reserve-backed tokens across blockchains. By harnessing the power of blockchain technology, Tether enables you to store, send, and receive digital tokens instantly, securely, and globally, all at a fraction of the cost. Transparency is the bedrock of everything we do, ensuring trust in every transaction. Innovate with Tether Tether Finance: Our innovative product suite features the world’s most trusted stablecoin, USDT , relied upon by hundreds of millions worldwide, alongside pioneering digital asset tokenization services. But That’s Just The Beginning Tether Power: Driving sustainable growth, our energy solutions optimize excess power for Bitcoin mining using eco-friendly practices in state-of-the-art, geo-diverse facilities. Tether Data: Fueling breakthroughs in AI and peer-to-peer technology, we reduce infrastructure costs and enhance global communications with cutting-edge solutions like KEET , our flagship app that redefines secure and private data sharing. Tether Education : Democratizing access to top-tier digital learning, we empower individuals to thrive in the digital and gig economies, driving global growth and opportunity. Tether Evolution : At the intersection of technology and human potential, we are pushing the boundaries of what is possible, crafting a future where innovation and human capabilities merge in powerful, unprecedented ways. Why Join Us? Our team is a global talent powerhouse, working remotely from every corner of the world. If you’re passionate about making a mark in the fintech space, this is your opportunity to collaborate with some of the brightest minds, pushing boundaries and setting new standards. We’ve grown fast, stayed lean, and secured our place as a leader in the industry. If you have excellent English communication skills and are ready to contribute to the most innovative platform on the planet, Tether is the place for you. Are you ready to be part of the future? About The Job Tether and its affiliated entities (e.g. Bitfinex) are searching for an organized self-starter to join our Regulatory and Licensing team as Head of Licensing and Regulatory Authorisations. The successful candidate is someone with an understanding of the regulatory environment pertaining to the digital-asset industry / stablecoin industry, and who is excited by the opportunity to apply their existing legal and / or regulatory experience in an exciting and dynamic business environment. The Head of Licensing and Regulatory Authorisations will lead the development and execution of our global authorisations strategy across key jurisdictions, working through a geographically distributed team of regional regulatory affairs and licensing teams. This role is responsible for securing and maintaining regulatory approvals required for the company’s operations, ensuring alignment with shifting regulatory landscapes, and enabling sustainable market expansion. As a senior leader within the Regulatory Affairs & Licensing function, you will collaborate closely with regional licensing personnel, legal, compliance, product, and executive leadership to drive licensing initiatives end-to-end—from early regulatory assessments and submissions through to supervisory engagement and operational readiness. The ideal candidate brings deep multi-jurisdictional licensing expertise, exceptional stakeholder management skills, and the ability to coordinate across regions in a cohesive, consistent manner. You will report to the Vice President of the Regulatory Affairs and Licensing division, and work alongside project managers and members of the wider business to execute on regulatory and licensing initiatives. Responsibilities Licensing Strategy & Execution Design and implement a unified global licensing strategy, ensuring consistency across regional approaches. Work closely with regional licensing personnel to assess regulatory pathways, evaluate market feasibility, and prioritise jurisdictions. Oversee and guide the preparation, submission, and management of licensing applications and / or other regulatory authorisation processes, in collaboration with regional teams. Ensure alignment between regional licensing efforts and global business priorities. Regional Coordination & Stakeholder Management Serve as the central point of coordination for licensing and regulatory authorisation activity across all regions, ensuring standards, documentation, and approaches remain cohesive. Provide direct support, guidance, and escalation oversight to regional licensing personnel. Align regulatory authorisation efforts with regulatory affairs leads to coordinate regulatory engagement strategies across regions. Regulatory Engagement Act as a senior represen

data.title: Managing Director, Asset Allocation
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: Title: Managing Director, Asset Allocation Location: Hong Kong and Singapore Reporting To: Investment Advisory Committee (IAC) The Opportunity A prestigious, multi-generational Single Family Office (SFO) headquartered in Singapore is seeking an exceptional investment leader to serve as Managing Director, Asset Allocation . As the architect of the family’s long-term investment legacy, you will lead a high-performing platform of 30+ professionals across both Front-Office Investment and Middle/Back-Office Operations. This is a rare, high-stature "hybrid" mandate that demands the intellectual rigor of a Sovereign Wealth Fund (SWF) combined with the agility, discretion, and entrepreneurial spirit of a premier private investment platform. The Role: Strategic Orchestration & Ecosystem Leadership Total Portfolio Strategy: Oversee a sophisticated global multi-asset strategy, balancing long-term strategic targets to navigate macro cycles. Institutional Frameworks: Implement world-class investment governance (mirroring SWF, Pension, or Endowment standards) to ensure capital preservation while capturing alpha across diverse liquidity profiles. GP Relationship Mastery: Leverage a deep global network to secure “first call” access to top-tier Private Equity funds, co-investments, and direct secondary opportunities. Ecosystem Representation: Act as the firm’s primary representative within the Singapore and global financial ecosystem. You will foster critical relationships with regional regulators, peer family offices, and institutional partners. Trusted Advisory: Serve as a high-touch advisor to the Principals and the IAC, translating complex market dynamics into actionable, high-conviction investment themes. Operational Stewardship: Provide strategic leadership to both the investment and operations teams, ensuring a seamless, institutional-grade lifecycle from deal execution to settlement and risk reporting. The Profile: Visionary Leadership & Uncompromising Integrity 20+ Years of Distinguished Experience: A proven career path with significant tenure at a top-tier SWF, large-scale endowment, or global asset manager is essential. Multi-Asset Mastery: A verifiable track record of delivering superior risk-adjusted returns through various market cycles, with deep expertise in complex portfolio construction. Global Network Advantage: An established, "ready-to-use" network of Tier-1 GP relationships and industry titans. Leadership Gravitas: Natural ability to lead a sizable multi-disciplinary team and the emotional intelligence to influence and partner with very hands-on Principals. Ethics & Discretion: Demonstrates the highest level of ethical standards and absolute discretion… qualities essential for representing a prominent family in high-stakes negotiations and global markets. Academic Excellence: Advanced degree (Master’s or MBA) from a leading global institution; CFA or CAIA designations are highly preferred. To explore this mandate, please submit your CV for a confidential discussion. Only shortlisted candidates of the highest caliber will be contacted.

data.title: Project Director (Residential)
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text:
Overview

At AtkinsRéalis, we are seeking an experienced Project Director with a strong background in complex building projects. This role requires a forward-thinking leader with over 20 years of experience managing large, multi-disciplinary teams on complex construction projects.

Your role

Lead, plan, and direct multidisciplinary teams in the successful delivery of residential projects.Manage all aspects of project execution, including safety, quality, schedule, and cost control, ensuring alignment with client objectives.Build and maintain long-term relationships with key stakeholders and clients, enhancing AtkinsRéalis' reputation and identifying new business opportunities.Monitor contractor performance to ensure compliance with contractual obligations.Oversee the coordination and management of large-scale building projects, focusing on publicrealm, enabling works, and building assets.Ensure resource allocation meets current and future project demands, maximizing operational efficiency.Ensure the highest standards of Health & Safety on all construction activities.

About You

Degree-qualified in engineering or a related field (BSc, BEng, BA or equivalent); Chartered status preferred.20+ years of experience in construction, with at least 7 years in roles similar to this, focused on large building projects.Expertise in managing large-scale, complex construction operations, particularly within the rail sector.Strong communication and reporting skills, capable of engaging with senior executives and managing client expectations.Demonstrated ability to deliver high-quality projects on time and within budget.Experience in managing multidisciplinary teams and complex stakeholder relationships.A deep understanding of construction techniques, project controls, and safety management.A strategic thinker with the ability to mobilize teams, plan effectively, and manage both technical and commercial aspects of projects.Strong interpersonal skills and ability to build and maintain effective working relationships.A track record of delivering high-profile, large-scale residential projects.

Rewards & benefits

Explore the rewards and benefits that help you thrive – at every stage of your life and your career.

This Includes

Tax-free salary.Comprehensive life insurance coverage.Premium medical insurance for you and your dependents.Generous annual leave balance.Flexible and hybrid work solutions.Remote work opportunities outside of country.Company gratuity scheme.Discretionary bonus program.Annual flight contribution.Relocation assistance.Transportation & housing allowances (available for remote work locations).Employee Wellbeing Program: 24/7 access to specialists in finance, legal matters, family care, personal health, fitness, and nutrition.

Seize every opportunity to sharpen your skills, expand your expertise, and be recognized for the impact you make.

About AtkinsRéalis

We're AtkinsRéalis, a world-class engineering services and nuclear organization. We connect people, data and technology to transform the world's'infrastructure and energy systems. Together, with our industry partners and clients, and our global team of consultants, designers, engineers and project managers, we can change the world. We're committed to leading our clients across our various end markets to engineer a better future for our planet and its people.

Find out more.

Strong communication skills are required to draw out requirements and to challenge where appropriate and to establish bond with key stakeholders. Must have master's or bachelor's degree in information technology or relevant discipline. Minimum Experience 12+ years of experience in Financial Services, Strategy function, Business management and/or Technology execution. Capacity to work with people at all levels in an organization and with people from many cultural backgrounds. Able to manage effectively a number of competing priorities. data.title: Principal Enterprise Architect
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text: The future of banking isn't just about "tech"—it’s about the seamless integration of Business Capability and AI-driven Execution . We are seeking a visionary Principal Enterprise Architect for a leading Tier-1 bank in the UAE. This is a high-impact role for a strategist who speaks the language of both a seasoned banker and a cloud-native engineer. Based in the region and ready to lead, you will be the authoritative owner of the enterprise capability landscape, ensuring strategy translates directly into high-performance technical reality. What You’ll Do Daily The Blueprint: Define, model, and manage the enterprise business capability landscape to drive strategic alignment. Technical Excellence: Architect scalable, secure, and cloud-native systems using modern patterns (Microservices, Event-Driven, AI). The Integrator: Act as the "Chief Translator" between business design, strategy, and IT execution. Investment Strategy: Enable portfolio rationalization and operating model design through structured capability heatmapping. Authority: Serve as the primary owner of the capability map and its relationship to journeys, services, and technology. Profile Banking Domain experience Cloud Native: Hands-on experience designing and governing enterprise-scale applications in AWS, Azure, OCI, or GCP. AI Maven: Proven experience integrating AI/ML into enterprise frameworks is a must. Modeling Mastery: High proficiency in architecture tooling (e.g., LeanIX, Mega, BizzDesign, or Sparx EA ). Regional Presence: Ideally currently based in the UAE/GCC with a pulse on the local regulatory and business landscape. Core Competencies Capability Modeling: Mastery of defining and structuring capabilities at all abstraction levels. Strategic Alignment: Linking technical evolution to regulatory changes and business priorities. Governance & Reuse: Reducing duplication and promoting architectural efficiency across domains. Cross-Domain Collaboration: Strong engagement skills across Business, EA, and Transformation teams. This is a chance to lead the architectural evolution of one of the region's most influential financial institutions. If you thrive at the intersection of banking domain knowledge and modern tech, we want to hear from you.

data.title: Test & Commissioning Director

data.jd_text: About Us A career at Hitachi Rail will help create a legacy. With operations in every corner of the world, our work goes to the cutting-edge of digital transformation and technology. data.title: Director - Managed Schools - ADNOC Schools
data.location: Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.jd_text:
Job Description

Aldar Education is currently seeking a Director - Managed Schools (ADNOC) to support our growing family of managed schools in the UAE, commencing immediately.

The Director – Managed Schools (ADNOC) will be fully responsible for effectively leading all school improvement strategies, marketing, and enrolment activities of the managed schools and have commercial and education line management of all managed schools. The incumbent will continuously strive to exceed internal & external customer expectations, capitalizing the economic profit and return on capital investment, while embracing the Aldar Education Core Values.

Aldar Education is the leading education group in Abu Dhabi, we provide inclusive and innovative learning that inspires and empowers communities, Aldar Education aims to be your employer of choice. We educate over 34,000 students across our group of owned and managed schools in Abu Dhabi and Al Ain and as we grow so does our need for highly skilled, inspirational, and dedicated school leaders and employees across the group.

Working collaboratively, our purpose is to empower the next generation to shape our future, directly supporting the educational goals of Abu Dhabi’s government. Today, Aldar Education’s efforts are guided by the Abu Dhabi Economic Vision 2030 plan, which aims to build a sustainable knowledge-based economy through premium education.

We are a “Great Place To Work” and currently employ over 1,400 teachers to deliver the English National Curriculum, the highly regarded American Massachusetts State Curriculum, and the prestigious International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme all with an international dimension.

This is an exciting opportunity to join the highly successful Aldar family of schools and to help shape the future of Abu Dhabi’s leading school group.

Responsibilities

Main Duties 

 Provide robust and intellectual leadership, vision, and strategic direction to achieve the highest levels of performance and ensure a culture of continuous improvement across all key areas.  Lead and support managed schools in order to build capacity and capability towards meeting current and future challenges in line with company priorities.  Foster highly effective relationships with other members of the team responsible for central functions, (such as HR; Finance; Marketing; Enrolments and IT, etc) in meeting identified key objectives.  Work alongside the Director of Education and other members of the Executive Leadership Team in the delivery of the company’s stated outcomes against a clearly defined set of performance indicators and standards.  Work alongside the Director of Education and the Executive Leadership Team to deliver the education strategy, mission and vision for managed schools. Through direct reports, ensure schools are aligned and articulate the identified strategic direction and build a shared sense of vision and purpose for all schools and their communities.  To support and advise HQ departments and School Principals on efficient and effective school operation processes, strategy and development and any other duties as required by the Director of Education 


Educational Leadership

 Inspire and support direct reports in the delivery of high standards of student achievement, increased student progress, school inspection increases using available data to drive improvement.  Support Leadership and other senior staff to shape the strategic direction, guiding the delivery of specified educational goals and directives for managed schools.  Provide quality assurance of all strategic documents such as schools strategic improvement/development plans and self-evaluations, taking appropriate action as required.  Lead in the effective implementation (and ongoing review) of learning and assessment frameworks that use benchmarking and value-add data, to monitor and report student progress and achievement.  Quality assure curriculum offers and champion new educational thinking and educational initiatives in conjunction with the Senior Executive team and schools.  Support Principals in the most appropriate educational strategies ensuring equity of educational outcomes to enrich the school as a learning environment for its students, families and the wider community.  To provide effective, innovative and professional leadership and direction for Principals and other staff coaching, mentoring and talent managment to achieve the best outcomes for children.  Provide support and guidance in relation to inspection planning, preparation and quality assuring the SEF. (School self evaluation form) 


Relationship Management

 Promote and represent the company effectively and positively to all internal and external stakeholders and seek opportunities to expand its role across the UAE and globally.  Represent the company at school functions, interacting with parents in a professional and collaborative manner to build trust in the company and strong community relations.  Devel

data.title: Head of Bancassurance
